initial_program:
% Identify inner cells (nonzero and not border 8)
inner(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0, V != 8.
component(R,C) :- inner(R,C,_).

% Bounding box of the inner component
minR(N) :- N = #min{R : component(R,_,_)}.
maxR(N) :- N = #max{R : component(R,_,_)}.
minC(N) :- N = #min{C : component(_,C,_)}.
maxC(N) :- N = #max{C : component(_,C,_)}.

% Positive bindings for the rotation
boundMinC(Cmin) :- component(_,Cmin,_).
boundMaxR(Rmax) :- component(Rmax,_,_).

% Rotated positions (90 clockwise inside the bounding box)
rot(R,R2,C2,V) :- inner(R,C,V), R2 = C - Cmin, C2 = Rmax - R.

% Colour cycle: 24, 36
output(R2,C2,4) :- rot(R,R2,C2,V), V = 2.
output(R2,C2,6) :- rot(R,R2,C2,V), V = 3.
output(R2,C2,2) :- rot(R,R2,C2,V), V = 4.
output(R2,C2,3) :- rot(R,R2,C2,V), V = 6.

% Keep zeroes and border colour unchanged
output(R,C,0) :- input(R,C,0).
output(R,C,8) :- input(R,C,8).

% Exactly one colour per output cell
output_cell(R,C) :- output(R,C,_).
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.
